parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
interface CarPart {
  + PrintPart()
  + AddPart(v interface{})
  + RemovePart(v interface{})
}

class CylinderBlock
class Sump
class Crankshaft
class Rod
class Absorber
class Damping
class Stabilizer
class Rack
class Lever
class Spring

class Engine {
  Container: list.List
}

class Suspenstion {
  Container: list.List
}

class Car {
  Container: list.List
}

CarPart <|.. Engine
CarPart <|.. Suspenstion
CarPart <|.. Car

CylinderBlock --> Engine
Sump --> Engine
Crankshaft --> Engine
Rod --> Engine

Absorber --> Suspenstion
Damping --> Suspenstion
Stabilizer --> Suspenstion
Rack --> Suspenstion
Lever --> Suspenstion
Spring --> Suspenstion

Engine --> Car
Suspenstion --> Car

@enduml
```
